title: iranecio eriospermus
intro: Iranecio eriospermus, also known as Erigeron alpinus, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Iranecio eriospermus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is traditionally prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application to accelerate wound healing.
